title: Road Ahead for Indian Auto Industry – Short Term vis-à-vis Long Term Recovery

summary.about: Whether improving monthly vehicle sales represented a durable recovery after India’s lockdown.
summary.audience: Automotive executives, investors and industrial policymakers.
summary.method: Compares month-on-month, year-on-year and quarterly sales across major two- and four-wheeler manufacturers.
summary.insights: Sequential sales showed returning confidence, but weak annual comparisons indicated that full long-term recovery remained distant.
